description: You are reorganizing the project portfolio in OpenProject. Move the work package titled 'Set up application monitoring and alerting' from the 'DevOps Automation' project to the 'Mobile Banking App' project. Ensure the work package is moved rather than copied, and that its subject remains 'Set up application monitoring and alerting'. You are logged in as admin (password: Admin1234!) and Firefox is currently showing the DevOps Automation project's work packages list.
